modules.name: Introduction to Amazon Web Services (AWS)
modules.description: Overview of AWS, cloud computing fundamentals, service models, and the shared responsibility model.

lessons.title: Overview of How to Access Amazon Web Services
The Service and Shared Responsibility Models
topics: Service models (IaaS, PaaS, FaaS, CaaS, SaaS)

modules.name: Introduction to Elastic Compute Cloud (EC2) Service
modules.description: AWS compute services, EC2 instance types, and the AWS Console.

modules.name: Introduction to Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) Networking
modules.description: VPC architecture, subnets, route tables, and network security.

modules.name: Introduction to Auto Scaling and Load Balancing
modules.description: Scaling strategies and load balancing for high availability.

modules.name: Introduction to Simple Storage Service (S3)
modules.description: S3 object storage, buckets, lifecycle management, and access control.

modules.name: Introduction to Identity and Access Management (IAM)
modules.description: IAM users, groups, roles, and permission policies.

modules.name: Introduction to Cloud Notifications (SNS) and Message Queues (SQS)
modules.description: AWS messaging services for event-driven and decoupled architectures.

modules.name: Introduction to Serverless Functions (Lambda)
modules.description: AWS Lambda for serverless computing and event-driven functions.

modules.name: AWS Pricing and Cost Management
modules.description: Understanding AWS pricing models, cost optimization, and budgeting tools.

modules.name: Introduction to Management and Governance
modules.description: AWS management, monitoring, and governance services.
